Original: ʾasata jo haj heʾejhehja maʾejn, myȝy lwañ tojē haj, lwañ hōhjačowpazy heny.
Lemmatized: ʾa jo haj heʾejhehja maʾejn myȝy lwañ tojē haj lwañ hehja heny
Interlinear1: ʾa-sata jo  haj heʾej-hehja  maʾejn , myȝy lwañ tojē  haj , lwañ h<ō>hja -čow -pazy     heny     .
Interlinear2: be-DEP  all GEN AGT  -birthe Ma'ein , soul and  earth GEN , and  birthe\R-REFL-REM.PRET 3.SG.NOM .
Saffjahim: ʾasata jo haj heʾejhehja maʾejn, miŋi lwaŋ tojee haj, lwaŋ hoohjatšowpasi̬ heni.
Plain: Ma'ein is the progenitor of all, the material and the spiritual, and is His own creator.
EME: Ma'ein is the Father of All, of the Soul and the Soil, and He is borne Himself.
Literal: Ma'ein is the birther of all, soul and earth, and he birthed himself.

Original: hamyzwapazoñ kā lej hyw henly lōmo kāme mȳ jo.
Lemmatized: hamyzwapazoñ kā lej how heny lōmo kāme mȳ jo
Interlinear1: hamyzwapazoñ kā  lej      h<y>w       henly    lōmo kāme  mȳ   jo       .
Interlinear2: afterlife    LOC 3.PL.NOM follow\3.PL 3.SG.DAT POSS happy time all/most .
Saffjahim: hamis̬wapaso̬ŋ kaa lej hiw henly loomo kaame mii jo.
Plain: Those devoted to Him will receive happiness in the afterlife.
EME: In the Afterlife, they who follow Him shall have Times most joyful.
Literal: In the afterlife, a most happy time belongs to those who follow him.

Original: te hejny hyzpaza lwañ ʾasata naḷow ṣela mōhaj ahōt maʾejn kōva heʾejtēhō.
Lemmatized: tē hejny paz lwañ ʾa naḷow ṣela-mōhaj ṣela-mōhaj ahōt maʾejn kōva heʾejtēhō
Interlinear1: t<e>      hejny hyz-paz   -a   lwañ ʾa-sata naḷow ṣela mōhaj    ahōt maʾejn kōva heʾejtēhō .
Interlinear2: last\3.SG three PL -avatar-ACC and  be-DEP  most  NEG  indirect holy Ma'ein Kuva He'ejteho .
Saffjahim: te hejni his̬pasa̬ lwaŋ ʾasata naḷow ṣela moohaj ahoot maʾejn koova heʾejteehoo.
Plain: Kuva He'ejteho is the last and most directly divine of the three avatars.
EME: The last of the three Incarnations is the most directly holy Ma'ein Kuva He'ejteho.
Literal: Kuva He'ejteho is the last and least indirectly holy of the three avatars.

Plain: The people with power should rule.
EME: The few People who have Power shall rule.
Literal: The few people who have power should rule.

Original: lohjaw how maʾejn lōmo hōly ẓono.
Lemmatized: lohjow how maʾejn lōmo hō ẓono
Interlinear1: l<o>hj<a>w        how    maʾejn lōmo hō  -ly  ẓono     .
Saffjahim: lohjaw how maʾejn loomo hooli ṣo̬no.
Plain: You are commanded to follow the will of Ma'ein.
EME: Commanded are ye to follow Ma'ein's will.
Literal: You are commanded to follow Ma'ein's will.

Original: ṣela te halo hejčēñ, syñ te myȝy.
Lemmatized: ṣela tē halo_hejčēñ halo_hejčēñ syñ tē myȝy
Interlinear1: ṣela t<e>      halo_hejčēñ   , syñ t<e>      myȝy .
Interlinear2: NEG  last\3.SG physical_form , but last\3.SG soul .
Saffjahim: ṣela te halo hejtšeeŋ, siŋ te miŋi.
Plain: The physical body is impermanent, but the soul is forever.
EME: The Body lasteth not, but indeed lasteth the Soul.
Literal: The physical form [born statue] does not last, but the soul lasts.
